sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n47995" key="qeatrw/dhs" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">θεατρ-ώδης</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ες</itype>, <sense id="n47995.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">theatrical</tr_>, in a bad sense, of persons, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1764.tlg001:14:27" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Vett.Val.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">14.27</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
